name: Fisher-Price Soft Sensory Rattle
description: A soft, colorful rattle designed to stimulate baby's senses with gentle sounds and bright colors.

reviews.text: I gifted this to my sister for her baby shower and she absolutely loved it. The baby couldn't put it down!
Bought as a gift for a friend's newborn. She messaged me a week later saying the baby sleeps with it.
Great quality but the rattle sound is a bit loud for my taste.
Perfect gift for a baby shower. Affordable, safe, and looks adorable.

name: Infantino Squeeze & Teethe Elephant
description: A BPA-free silicone teether shaped like an elephant, perfect for soothing sore gums during teething.

reviews.text: Gifted this to a colleague with a 4-month-old. She told me it saved her sanity during teething!
My go-to gift for new moms. Easy to clean, safe, and babies love it.
Works well but I wish it came in more colors.

name: Skip Hop Bandana Buddies Activity Toy
name_ar: لعبة بانداتا بوديز من سكيب هوب
description: An adorable multi-sensory activity toy with crinkle wings, teether, and rattle elements to engage babies.

reviews.text: I always gift this to new moms. It's the gift that keeps giving — babies are obsessed.
Bought for my nephew. My sister called it the best gift he received at his baby shower.
High quality but pricey. Worth it for a gift, maybe not for everyday use.

name: Chicco Natural Feeling Baby Bottle Set
name_ar: طقم زجاجات الرضاعة الطبيعية من تشيكو
description: A set of 3 anti-colic baby bottles with natural feeling nipples that mimic breastfeeding.

reviews.text: Best gift I ever gave a new mom. She specifically asked for these after she ran out.
Practical and thoughtful gift. Every new mom needs these.
The nipple flow is a bit fast for my newborn.

name: Aden + Anais Classic Muslin Swaddle Blankets (4-pack)
name_ar: طقم مناشف التقميط الموسلين من آدن وأنيس
description: 4-pack of breathable, soft muslin swaddle blankets in beautiful prints. A staple for every new mom.

reviews.text: This is my standard baby shower gift. Every single mom I've gifted this to has reordered.
I received this as a gift and I cannot recommend it enough. Bought two more sets myself.
Beautiful prints. Great for gifting because they look luxurious.

name: Munchkin Soothing White Noise Machine
description: Portable white noise machine with multiple soothing sounds to help babies sleep anywhere.

reviews.text: Gifted this to my best friend when she had her baby. She said it was the most useful gift she got.
I bought this as a gift after my own baby loved it. Now I gift it to every new mom I know.
Excellent product. The ocean sounds setting is our favourite.

name: Sophie la Girafe Classic Teether
description: The iconic French teething toy made from 100% natural rubber and food paint. A global mom favorite.

reviews.text: Sophie is THE gift for babies. Every mom I know has one. Gifted it 6 times.
Gifted this and the mom literally cried happy tears. It's a classic for a reason.
Pricey for a teether but worth it. Lasts forever.

name: VTech Sit-to-Stand Learning Walker
description: Interactive learning walker that grows with baby, featuring lights, music, and educational activities.

reviews.text: Best first birthday gift ever. The baby started walking within two weeks of getting this.
Gifted this for a first birthday. The mom said it's the only toy he plays with.
A bit noisy but kids love it. Batteries drain fast.

name: Babyzen YOYO Stroller Accessories Kit
name_ar: طقم ملحقات عربة يويو من بيبيزن
description: Premium accessories kit for the YOYO stroller including rain cover, organizer, and footmuff.

reviews.text: Gifted the organizer to a friend who has a YOYO. She uses it every single day.
Not a gift but very useful.

name: Ergobaby Omni 360 Baby Carrier
description: All-position baby carrier suitable from newborn, with lumbar support for parents and ergonomic seat for baby.

reviews.text: Received this as a gift and it changed my life as a new mom. Hands-free and baby is happy.
Pricey but worth gifting. The mom I gave it to uses it daily.

name: Lovevery The Play Gym
description: Stage-based developmental play gym with 35+ activities designed by child development experts.

reviews.text: The most thoughtful baby gift I've ever given. The mom was genuinely moved.
I group-gifted this with two friends for a baby shower. It was the star of the show.

name: Tommee Tippee Baby Bath Essentials Set
name_ar: طقم أساسيات حمام الطفل من تومي تيبي
description: Complete bath set including thermometer, bath seat, soft brush, and hooded towel.

reviews.text: Perfect baby shower gift. Everything you need in one box.
Gifted this to three different moms. All of them said it was practical and complete.
The thermometer is a bit fragile but the rest of the set is excellent.

name: Graco DreamGlider Gliding Swing
description: Converts from a gliding swing to a gliding seat, with soothing vibrations and 10 songs.

reviews.text: Group gifted this for a baby shower. The mom cried when she opened it. Life-changing for colic.
Expensive but worth every dirham. Gifted it and the mom said her baby only sleeps in it.

name: Nuby Printed Bib Set (5-pack)
description: Soft, waterproof bibs with cute prints, adjustable snaps, and deep crumb catcher pocket.

reviews.text: Cute and practical gift for any new mom. They always need bibs.
Good quality but nothing special as a gift.

name: Hatch Rest+ Sound Machine & Night Light
name_ar: جهاز الصوت والإضاءة الليلية هاتش ريست+
description: Smart sound machine, night light, and time-to-rise clock all in one. App-controlled for convenience.

reviews.text: The ultimate gift for any new mom. Bought it as a gift and she messages me weekly to thank me.
I gift this to every new mom I know now. It pays for itself in sleep saved.
